description: Subsystem-oriented Orleans runtime, directory, activation, storage, Azure Blob journaling, DurableJobs, and workload metrics with live quantiles and Prometheus bucket heatmaps.

links.title: .NET runtime metrics
links.tooltip: Open the linked .NET runtime dashboard with the current time range and variables.

links.title: ASP.NET Core
links.tooltip: Open the ASP.NET Core dashboard with the current time range and variables.

links.title: ASP.NET Core Endpoint
links.tooltip: Open the ASP.NET Core per-endpoint dashboard with the current time range and variables.

panels.description: Number of scraped Orleans silo instances in the current selection. Counts only instances that emit silo-specific metrics so non-silo services (for example, the web frontend) are excluded.
panels.title: Active silos

panels.description: Current live Orleans grain activations across selected silos.
panels.title: Live grain activations

panels.description: Incoming grain calls recorded by the playground filter, grouped by grain type rather than grain id.
panels.title: Request rate

panels.description: Error ratio for incoming grain calls recorded by the playground filter.
panels.title: Request error %

panels.description: P99 incoming grain call latency from the playground grain-type histogram.
panels.title: Request p99

panels.description: P99 end-to-end workflow latency for the playground workload.
panels.title: Workflow p99 latency

panels.description: Incoming grain calls per silo, tagged by success/error status and grain type.
panels.title: Per-silo request rate

panels.description: P95 incoming grain call latency per silo.
panels.title: Per-silo p95 latency

panels.description: Live grain activations split by silo and Orleans grain type label.
panels.title: Per-silo live grain activations

panels.description: Directory registration throughput per silo.
panels.title: Per-silo directory registration rate

panels.description: Top live grain activation counts using Orleans runtime grain type labels.
panels.title: Top live grain types

panels.description: Incoming grain call throughput by GrainId.Type.ToString() and status.
panels.title: Request throughput

panels.description: Per-grain-type error ratio. The grain_type label is the grain type only, not the grain id/key.

targets.expr: sum by (grain_type) (rate(playground_grain_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", grain_type=~"$grain_type", status="error"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (grain_type) (rate(playground_grain_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", grain_type=~"$grain_type"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9)

panels.title: Request error rate

panels.description: Per-grain-type latency quantiles from the playground incoming call filter.
panels.title: Request latency quantiles

panels.description: Heatmap for selected grain-type request latency buckets. This is tagged by grain type only, never grain id/key.
panels.title: Request latency heatmap
Global Orleans app request latency quantiles
panels.description: Global Orleans app request latency quantiles. This runtime metric is not split by grain type.

panels.title: Global grain request latency heatmap
panels.description: Global Orleans app request latency heatmap. Use the Grain requests row for per-grain-type latency.

panels.title: Grain directory cache and partition size
Journaling storage latency quantiles by operation

targets.expr: sum by (operation) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operations_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", status="error"}[$__rate_interval])) or on(operation) (0 * sum by (operation) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operations_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Azure Blob journal operation latency heatmap

panels.description: Logical append payload size produced by Orleans.Journaling before the storage provider writes it. Use this to tune append batch size.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_bytes_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation="append"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_bytes_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation="append"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_bytes_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation="append"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_bytes_sum{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation="append"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_bytes_count{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation="append"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Journaling append batch bytes

panels.description: Time a logical storage work item spent waiting in the JournaledStateManager serialized work queue before processing began. Provider-internal waits and retries remain part of storage operation latency.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, operation, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_queue_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation=~"append|snapshot|delete"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, operation, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_queue_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation=~"append|snapshot|delete"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, operation, status) (rate(orleans_journaling_storage_operation_queue_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", operation=~"append|snapshot|delete"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Journaling storage queue delay quantiles

panels.description: Distribution of JournaledStateManager work-queue wait time for logical storage writes/deletes.
panels.title: Journaling storage queue delay heatmap
